body.title: Fix 3 pre-existing failures in test_inference_tier_escalation.py
body.intention: I intend that the inference escalation test suite is green, so a real regression there is visible instead of masked by standing red.
body.description:
**Problem:** 3 tests in tests/inference/test_inference_tier_escalation.py fail at clean HEAD (confirmed via worktree 2026-06-30, unrelated to T-router-data-schema): TestEscalationCeiling::test_hop_0_passes_through, TestEscalationHandoff::test_hop_1_prepends_summary_to_system, TestEscalationHandoff::test_hop_1_no_prior_attempt_no_prepend. All fail with `TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable` at `mock_source.call.call_args[0][0]` — mock_source.call was never invoked because dispatch aborts with SYSTEM_ALARM 'no live source for task_class=worker model=openai/gpt-4o-mini'. The test sets `d._sources = {'openrouter': mock_source}` and dispatches, but the model 'openai/gpt-4o-mini' resolves through the rules engine to no live source. Test is stale vs current dispatch/routing wiring.
**Proposed shape:** determine whether the test's mock-source injection or the model id is stale vs current device.dispatch routing; fix the fixture (register the mock under the resolved source_name / use a model the registry knows, or stub route()) so the escalation-hop assertions actually exercise dispatch. Do NOT change dispatch behavior to satisfy the test unless dispatch is genuinely wrong — verify which side is stale first.
**Affected files:** tests/inference/test_inference_tier_escalation.py (likely fixture only); possibly unseen_university/devices/inference/device.py if dispatch is the stale side.
**Design rules:** integration tests hit real Postgres, no mocks for DB; ALL inference through the Proxy; no SQLite.
**Scope boundary:** these 3 tests only. Not the router epic.
**Test plan:** the 3 named tests go green; no other inference test regresses.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: DUPLICATE of T-inference-tier-escalation-tests-red — same 3 tests, same root cause (NoneType at mock_source.call because dispatch aborted on 'no live source' with the old default model). GREEN at HEAD now (3 passed, verified). Fixed during the domain-routing batch (default→'' 258168b8 + _monitor in _make_device 1bfbc843).
body.unproven_reason: Duplicate-close; proof is the 3 green tests at HEAD, shipped under the batch commits not a fresh proof run.
